hero.title: Expert Care for Your Outdoor Home.
hero.subtitle: Transforming your outdoor spaces into living masterpieces with precision, passion, and unparalleled expertise.

footer.description: Premium landscape design and maintenance services for beautiful, functional outdoor spaces.

whyUs.title: Why homeowners trust us with their vision.

quality.title: Quality Guaranteed
quality.desc: We never cut corners. Our team uses the highest-grade materials and equipment.

reliable.title: Reliable Schedules
reliable.desc: We show up when we say we will. Your time is valuable, and we respect it.

passionate.title: Passionate Care
passionate.desc: We treat every garden as if it were our own, with attention to every detail.

testimonials.quote: Canela Landscaping completely transformed our backyard. Their attention to detail during the spring cleanup was unlike anything we've seen before. Our lawn has never looked better!
testimonials.author: Sarah & Michael J.

cta.title: Ready to start your next outdoor project?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of happy homeowners today. Get a free, no-obligation quote.

lawn-mowing.title: Professional Lawn Mowing
lawn-mowing.description: Precision mowing with professional striping and trimming for a pristine look.

edges.title: Clean Edging
edges.description: Sharp, clean borders between your lawn and walkways or garden beds.

lawn-maintenance.title: Lawn Maintenance
lawn-maintenance.description: Comprehensive care including fertilization and aeration to keep your grass healthy.

bush-trimming.title: Bush & Hedge Trimming
bush-trimming.description: Expert pruning to maintain the shape and health of your shrubs and hedges.

weeds.title: Weed Pulling
weeds.description: Thorough removal of invasive weeds from your garden beds and lawn.

mulch.title: Mulch Installation
mulch.description: Fresh, high-quality mulch to protect soil moisture and suppress weeds.

top-soil.title: Top Soil & Grading
top-soil.description: Leveling and nutrient-rich soil application for optimal plant growth.

reseeding.title: Lawn Reseeding
reseeding.description: Repairing thin or bare spots with premium grass seed blends.

storm-cleanup.title: Storm Damage Clean-up
storm-cleanup.description: Rapid response to clear debris, branches, and mess after severe weather.

yard-cleanup.title: General Yard Cleanup
yard-cleanup.description: Restoring order to your outdoor space with comprehensive clearing and hauling.

leaf-cleanup.title: Leaf Removal
leaf-cleanup.description: Efficient leaf collection and removal to protect your grass during fall.

patios.title: Patio Repair & Masonry
patios.description: Fixing cracked pavers, leveling surfaces, and restoring stone features.

seasonal-cleanup.title: Spring & Fall Clean-up
seasonal-cleanup.description: Deep cleaning and preparation for the changing seasons.

gravel.title: River Gravel Installation
gravel.description: Beautiful, low-maintenance gravel features and drainage solutions.

snow-plow.title: Snow Plowing
snow-plow.description: Reliable, 24/7 snow removal for driveways and walkways during winter.

story.title: Rooted in Quality.
story.content: Founded over 15 years ago, Canela Landscaping began with a simple mission: to provide the highest level of craftsmanship and care for every outdoor space we touch.
story.quote: "We don't just mow lawns; we cultivate environments where families grow and memories are made."

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: "To elevate the standard of residential landscaping through innovation, reliability, and artistic design."

promise.title: Our Promise
promise.content: Full insurance, certified technicians, and a satisfaction guarantee on every single project we undertake.

team.title: Meet the Canela Family.
team.description: At Canela Landscaping, we treat every lawn like our own. As a family-owned and operated team, our passion for excellence is a personal commitment from our family to yours—led with heart by Domingo and Nora.

card.title: Our Team
card.description: A dedicated group of horticultural experts, designers, and maintenance pros who love what they do.

servicesPage.title: Comprehensive Landscape Solutions.
servicesPage.subtitle: From precision lawn maintenance to complex stone repairs and seasonal preparation, we cover every aspect of your outdoor environment.

cta.title: Don't see what you're looking for?
cta.subtitle: We provide custom landscape and maintenance packages tailored to your specific needs. Reach out for a specialized consultation.

gallery.title: Our Extensive Work
gallery.subtitle: Explore our comprehensive gallery of transformations across Cleveland, organized by service types and project category.

cta.title: Ready for your next transformation?
cta.subtitle: Bring Domingo Canela's expertise to your property today.

contact.title: Start Your Transformation.
contact.subtitle: Ready to elevate your outdoor space? Fill out the form, we will provide a customized estimate for your vision in the Cleveland area.
